name: Anycolor Horoscopes
author: Poki
description: Anycolor Horoscopes is a coloring game where you use unique color palettes to fill up Zodiac themed drawings. You have access to a variety of tools and colors at your command, and you're free to use any color to paint any part of the image. There's no limit to your imagination! Whether you are a Scorpio or a Libra, or a Rooster in the Chinese Zodiac - there are many drawings you can enjoy. There are also extra palettes that you can unlock, so make sure to check to color menu to explore it. Don't forget to download and share your art after you're done coloring them. And make sure to share Anycolor Horoscopes with your friends and show off your creations! How to play Anycolor Horoscopes? Choose an image from the Gallery. Scroll down for more images. Tap or click anywhere within the bounds of a blank painting to fill it up. Use the brush tool to gain finer control over the color. Choose a color from a palette. Scroll for more color palettes. Zoom in for easier coloring of small areas. While Zooming in, the brush tool size is smaller for more precise coloring. Undo button removes your previous coloring action. Redo button restores your previous coloring action. When happy with your coloring, use -> and finalize using Filters and Outlines. Download your image and share to friends. Who created Anycolor Horoscopes? Anycolor Horoscopes was created by Aniway, a game development team based in Finland. Play their other puzzle and creation games on Poki: Anycolor , Anycolor by Numbers and Koala Bros Bash How can I play Anycolor Horoscopes for free? You can play Anycolor Horoscopes for free on Poki. Can I play Anycolor Horoscopes on mobile devices and desktop? Anycolor Horoscopes can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
